mapper.select: SELECT * FROM auction_goods WHERE id = #{goodsId} AND del_flag = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE auction_record SET is_highest = 0 WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM auction_record WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND del_flag = 0 AND is_highest = 1 ORDER BY bid_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ar.*, u.nick_name as buyerName FROM auction_record ar LEFT JOIN auction_user u ON ar.buyer_id = u.id WHERE ar.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND ar.del_flag = 0 AND ar.bid_status = 1 ORDER BY ar.bid_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ar.*, u.nick_name AS buyer_name, g.goods_name FROM auction_record ar LEFT JOIN auction_user u ON ar.buyer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN auction_goods g ON ar.goods_id = g.id WHERE ar.buyer_id = #{buyerId} AND ar.del_flag = 0 AND ar.bid_status = 1 ORDER BY ar.bid_time DESC
